channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from johnnymorilloo

item.title: Lion’s Mane Steak (Juicy, Smoky & Meaty) This Lion’s Mane steak is tender, flavourful, and packed with umami goodness. It sears beautifully, has that perfect chew, and best of all—it’s 100% vegan. I am not the first creator to use Lion’s Mane mushroom, bu
item.description: Lion’s Mane Steak (Juicy, Smoky & Meaty) This Lion’s Mane steak is tender, flavourful, and packed with umami goodness. It sears beautifully, has that perfect chew, and best of all—it’s 100% vegan. I am not the first creator to use Lion’s Mane mushroom, bu

item.title: Couldn’t be happier @SourceofLife
item.description: Couldn’t be happier @SourceofLife

item.title: (ve) Pork Menudo INGREDIENTS - 200g protein (previously used @eatplanted but honestly use anything you like) - 2 tbsp soy sauce - 1/2 piece of lemon - 2 tbsp Veg Oil - 1 small onion, sliced - 2-3 garlic gloves, chopped - 2-3 dried pieces of bay leaves
item.description: (ve) Pork Menudo INGREDIENTS - 200g protein (previously used @eatplanted but honestly use anything you like) - 2 tbsp soy sauce - 1/2 piece of lemon - 2 tbsp Veg Oil - 1 small onion, sliced - 2-3 garlic gloves, chopped - 2-3 dried pieces of bay leaves

item.title: Nipple chafing is real… no one talks about it 🤝 @Vaseline Petroleum Jelly has been my go-to marathon prep hack for years If you know, you know 👀 Shop the bundle + join my LIVE for all my race day tips #TheNippleSponsorship #VaselineVerified

item.title: Cold Soba Noodles Oh there’s a heatwave & have no idea what to make. I got you! Ingredients: this sauce roughly makes 750 mil, ideally can make 2 to 3 bowls 400ml cold water 150ml soy sauce (use light for salt, or mix with dark for depth) 75ml rice wine
item.description: Cold Soba Noodles Oh there’s a heatwave & have no idea what to make. I got you! Ingredients: this sauce roughly makes 750 mil, ideally can make 2 to 3 bowls 400ml cold water 150ml soy sauce (use light for salt, or mix with dark for depth) 75ml rice wine

item.title: 10 second tofu recipe 🌶️ YOU can recreate this however you like, so please use this recipe as a template and enjoy! Ingredients 300g silken tofu 2 tbsp soy sauce or tamari (gluten free) 1 tbsp chilli oil 1 tsp sesame oil 1 tsp rice vinegar 1 tsp a
item.description: 10 second tofu recipe 🌶️ YOU can recreate this however you like, so please use this recipe as a template and enjoy! Ingredients 300g silken tofu 2 tbsp soy sauce or tamari (gluten free) 1 tbsp chilli oil 1 tsp sesame oil 1 tsp rice vinegar 1 tsp a

item.title: My name is not Logan but this is an elite World Cup snack! This Korean-inspired cucumber salad takes 5 minutes and is seriously addictive. However if you don’t like sports at all, at least your stomach will like this Ingredients • 3 small cucumbers, thi

item.title: Finding the best pastel de nata in Lisbon 🇵🇹 Growing up in West London, Lisboa Patisserie was my favourite spot for traditional Portuguese pastries. So when I finally made it to Lisbon, I had to visit the birthplace of the pastel de nata and see how it co
item.description: Finding the best pastel de nata in Lisbon 🇵🇹 Growing up in West London, Lisboa Patisserie was my favourite spot for traditional Portuguese pastries. So when I finally made it to Lisbon, I had to visit the birthplace of the pastel de nata and see how it co

item.title: Everyone told me to visit @26 Vegan Food Project so of course I had to visit. 📍Rua da Horta Seca 5, Piso -2 1200-213 Lisboa, Portugal Monday to Sunday: 12:30-18:00 | 19:00-23:00 FRIED ‘CUTTLEFISH’ €8 FRANCESINHA €17 (W/ EGG €3) Great date would see them
item.description: Everyone told me to visit @26 Vegan Food Project so of course I had to visit. 📍Rua da Horta Seca 5, Piso -2 1200-213 Lisboa, Portugal Monday to Sunday: 12:30-18:00 | 19:00-23:00 FRIED ‘CUTTLEFISH’ €8 FRANCESINHA €17 (W/ EGG €3) Great date would see them

item.title: Adventure is simple. Adventure is free. Adventure is being fully present. It makes us feel alive. And that’s why it never stops calling #portugal #lisbon #fyp

item.title: 10 tasting menu from @𝐨 𝐆𝐚𝐦𝐛𝐮𝐳𝐢𝐧𝐨 One of my last nights in Lisbon I saw @sepps | Giuseppe Federici tried this place and I definitely had to give it a try. I tell you now it was one of the best meals I’ve ever had in my entire life So if you’re in Lisbon,
item.description: 10 tasting menu from @𝐨 𝐆𝐚𝐦𝐛𝐮𝐳𝐢𝐧𝐨 One of my last nights in Lisbon I saw @sepps | Giuseppe Federici tried this place and I definitely had to give it a try. I tell you now it was one of the best meals I’ve ever had in my entire life So if you’re in Lisbon,

item.title: Unreal experience with @Skoda UK watching @Le Tour de France! Grateful for this 3 day trip with them, from the morning ride with the cycling ambassadors to the helicopter ride, then watching the cyclists cross the finish line. The best part? We rode ahead
item.description: Unreal experience with @Skoda UK watching @Le Tour de France! Grateful for this 3 day trip with them, from the morning ride with the cycling ambassadors to the helicopter ride, then watching the cyclists cross the finish line. The best part? We rode ahead
